papers.title: World-Model Priors for Photoreal Video Diffusion at 10× Lower Cost
papers.summary: Sora-class video, one tenth the GPU bill — a 3B-param world model is all you need as a prior.

papers.title: PPO-Gated Mixture of Experts: Learned Routing for Sparse Inference
papers.summary: Tossing top-k gating for a tiny RL router cut MoE inference cost 3× with no quality loss.

papers.title: Diffusion Transformers Scale Linearly: Empirical Laws Across 12 Orders of FLOPs
papers.summary: New scaling curves overthrow SD-XL cost predictions — DiT is cheaper than anyone realized.

papers.title: Can Foundation Models Replicate Nobel-Winning Experiments? A Diagnostic Benchmark
papers.summary: Surprisingly, sometimes yes. We built a 220-task benchmark and a 70B model nailed 41 of them cold.

papers.title: Reasoning Without Thinking: Adaptive Chain-of-Thought Truncation
papers.summary: Skip the chain-of-thought when the answer is obvious — saves 40% tokens with no MMLU regression.

papers.title: Embodied Agents Learn Object Affordances from YouTube Cooking Videos
papers.summary: A 7B vision-language model trained on cooking footage tops the robot grasping benchmark — no robot data.

papers.title: RLHF as Implicit Behavioral Cloning: A Theoretical Equivalence
papers.summary: RLHF and imitation learning are the same algorithm in disguise — with concrete consequences for alignment.

papers.title: Compressive Retrieval Attention: 10M Token Context, No Quadratic Penalty
papers.summary: Streaming compression + retrieval beats full attention at 10M tokens — and matches it under 128K.
